issues.detail: Completeness: does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
CrossPlatform: assumes Linux environment, not cross-platform.
Examples: lacks realistic examples beyond code snippets.
Uses curl piped to bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: docker-compose-crowdsec-nginx-bouncer
scenarios.rationale: Response A partially meets the rubric but uses incorrect COLLECTIONS values, while Response B provides no content.

scenarios.name: list-blocked-ips-and-alerts
scenarios.rationale: Both responses correctly mention the required commands, explain their outputs, and note sudo usage; A offers more detail but both satisfy the rubric fully.
